title: Coverage, Thresholds, and Meaningful Evidence · Broken-Build Bay
summary: Set coverage policy that exposes risk without encouraging empty tests. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a changed-code coverage and exception policy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret line, branch, function, condition, and path coverage limitations.
Choose global, package, and changed-code thresholds from risk and baseline.
Exclude generated or unreachable code with reviewed narrow rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a gates-coverage-review-1vbq4d: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Coverage Review into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-coverage-review-1vbq4d:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Coverage Review structural check is only one gate. a changed-code coverage and exception policy must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
